title: Auditing
description: Auditing is an applied course that delves into the fundamental theories, procedures,and methods of auditing.This course,with a primary focus on Certified Public Accountant(CPA) autiting,employs risk-based auditing as a guiding principle to elucidate the basic theories and practices of auditing.Key areas covered encompass:planning audit work;idendification,assessment,and response of audit risks;as well as the formulation of audit reports.
